{"credits": [{"type": "other", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/7692328?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amitguptagwl/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amitguptagwl/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amitguptagwl/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amitguptagwl/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/amitguptagwl", "id": 7692328, "login": "amitguptagwl", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc2OTIzMjg=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amitguptagwl/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amitguptagwl/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amitguptagwl/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amitguptagwl/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amitguptagwl/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/amitguptagwl", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44664", "cvss": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-91", "name": "XML Injection (aka Blind XPath Injection)"}], "description": "# Summary
The fix for https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gh4j-gqv2-49f6 in fast-xml-parser sanitizes `--` sequences in XML comment content using .replace(/--/g, '- -'). This skip the values containing three consecutive dashes (e.g., --->...), allowing an attacker to break out of an XML comment and inject arbitrary XML/HTML content.

### Impact
Any application with comment property enabled allow attacker to inject malicious or unwanted code like JS script tag in the XML/HTML output.

### Workarounds
Check for the presence of 3 consecutive dashes externally in the property value used for comment tag.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00194, "percentile": 0.09151}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-45c6-75p6-83cc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T16:27:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-45c6-75p6-83cc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-45c6-75p6-83cc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44664"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-13T16:16:58Z", "published_at": "2026-05-08T16:27:28Z", "references": ["https://github.com/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-builder/security/advisories/GHSA-45c6-75p6-83cc", "https://github.com/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-parser/security/advisories/GHSA-gh4j-gqv2-49f6", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44664", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-45c6-75p6-83cc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-builder/security-advisories/GHSA-45c6-75p6-83cc", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-builder", "summary": "fast-xml-builder Comment Value regex can be bypassed", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:37:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-45c6-75p6-83cc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.1.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "fast-xml-builder"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 1.1.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: fast-xml-builder Comment Value regex can be bypassed
